Book a Free Consultation

The initial consultation is a structured 30-minute conversation — by phone or video — to assess your situation and determine whether mediation is appropriate.

There is no obligation to proceed, and no fee for this session. Meridian will give you an honest assessment of whether your matter is suitable for mediation and what the process would involve.

All information submitted is treated as confidential and used solely to assess your situation prior to consultation. See our Privacy Policy.

Meridian Dispute Resolution Inc

Mediation services across Canada. Based in Saskatchewan. Not legal counsel. Not therapy.
